emails.subject: selected ferc - final
emails.body: selected ferc final I will no longer be monitoring FERC issuances on a regular basis. Tami Parr is continuing to monitor California developments, and will distribute updates and documents periodically. If you're not already receiving postings from Tami, and would like to, send her an email. I can still provide occasional assistance with FERC matters. These are the relevant FERC sites: CIPS--All issuances (orders, notices, news releases, meeting agendas, etc.): <URL> RIMS--Scanned filings and issuances (bitmaps): <URL> Important documents relating to western bulk power market issues: <URL> FERC news releases: <URL> RPA--Docket sheets and service lists: <URL> RTO page: <URL>

emails.subject: Re: selected ferc - final
emails.body: wait . do fates worse than death happen to nice guys? By the way, how are things in your part of the world? The lawyers here are packing for San Antonio. Are you going? (I'm not.) Hain, Mary 03/21/01 09:46PM Congrats and best of luck always! It couldn't happen to a nicer guy. From: LEE MARTIN/ENRON@enronxgate on 03/21/2001 03:36 PM CST
